subject: MASTER: HETE Alert 3163, 3167 technical optical observation
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <gcncirc@observ.inetcomm.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, A.Krylov, V.Kornilov, G.Borisov, D.Kuvshinov, A.Belinski,
I.Chilingarian, M.Kuznetsov,  S.Potanin, G.Antipov, N.Tiurina

Sternberg Astronomical Institute, Alexsandr Krylov Observatory, Moscow

After alert HETE 3167  MASTER robotic telescope
(http://observ.pereplet.ru) had automatically imaging  the corresponding
area of the sky (141 seconds after trigger time).  We have 7 unfiltered
images
of the error box (30s exposition, 6 squere degrees field) up to 19
magnitude.

After alert HETE 3168 MASTER robotic telescope
(http://observ.pereplet.ru) had automatically imaging  the corresponding
area of the sky (85 seconds after trigger time).  We have 7 unfiltered
images
of the error box (30s exposition, 6 squere degrees field) up to 19
magnitude.

Reduced FITS images  are available.
These are technical results.

This message may be cited.
